'''Uogo''' were a race of [[Humanoid/Legends|Humanoids]] native to the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Uogo'cor/Legends|Uogo'cor]], a [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]] world overrun by [[Pirate/Legends|pirates]].

==History==
The Uogo were a race of Humanoids which deemed themselves the "Suffering Ones." Native to the [[Trax sector/Legends|Trax sector]] planet, [[Uogo'cor/Legends|Uogo'cor]], the Uogo were dominated and oppressed by [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]] gangs which patrolled and harassed [[Starship/Legends|starships]] along the [[Trax Tube/Legends|Trax Tube]]. During the reign of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]], the gang called the [[Dark Warbirds]] overwhelmed the populace and oppressed them until the rise of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] in [[19 BBY/Legends|19 BBY]]. In a show of force, the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]] wiped out the pirates and laid claim to the world, enslaving the population after severely reducing the planet's population through brute force.<ref name="SWGK" />

The species suffered further devastation during the [[Yuuzhan Vong]]'s [[Yuuzhan Vong War|invasion]] of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]]. Seeing the world undefended, the invaders laid waste to it in their early campaigns for galactic domination.<ref name="The Essential Atlas">''[[The Essential Atlas]]''</ref>
